title: Better Nature (Vanilla Edition)
description: This resource pack adds mushrooms to trees, 3D leaves and new plants
body:
# Better Nature (Vanilla Edition)

This resource pack add variation to the existing plants and natural blocks

![A dragonfly flying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T1QVd6Ni/images/61afed4c7bf78ede9e453c73a9bb9882d72069b9.gif)

## Features:

- 3D leaves
- New plants
- Mushrooms on trees
- New underwater plants
- Branches on trees
- Better cactus
- Pebbles on stones
- Actual leaves on vines
- Beetles
- Dragonflies

## How does it work?

The resources pack randomly replaces some existing blocks/plants by new variants

## What is the difference between the resource pack and the [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-nature) version?

The resource pack doesn't have the new music discs and custom biomes music, but works without any mods loader unlike the mod version of the resource pack that includes server side features such as underwater particles, new music discs, and new animals compatible with vanilla clients
